tests.name: phase1_to_phase2_gate_passes
tests.details: scripts/check-phase-gate.sh exited 0 with 'Phase gates consistent.' message.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: After all phase1 steps + check-phase-gate passed, .current_phase remained 0. No script in the framework auto-advances current_phase. Manually set to 2 to continue test protocol. This is the U-D regression confirmation.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all phase1_architecture steps and running scripts/check-phase-gate.sh (RC=0), inspect .claude/phase-state.json — .current_phase is still 0.
framework_bugs.expected: Either check-phase-gate.sh or a follow-up command should advance .current_phase from 0 → 1 once the phase-1 gate passes and approval is logged.
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stayed at 0; phase advancement appears to require manual JSON edits. Confirms the still-open U-D bug from the 2026-04-25 sweep.

tests.name: start_feature_records_state
tests.details: After --start-feature uat-feat-1, jq '.build_loop.feature' = 'uat-feat-1'.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 6 build_loop steps for uat-feat-1 completed sequentially with RC=0; security_audit step accepted the stub findings file at docs/security-audits/uat-feat-1-security-audit.md.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' returned RC=0 after the 5 build steps were marked complete.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` SUCCEEDED (RC=0). The script-level check (process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message) correctly returned RC=1 with the BL-006 block message, but PreToolUse hook isn't enforced for shell-direct git. Confirms still-open U-C.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1, started uat-feat-2 build loop and committed `feat(uat-2): grace window test` successfully (RC=0); --check-commit-message also accepted the new feat: subject (RC=0). PR #17 BL-006 grace-window auto-reset verified working.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: With .claude/pending-approval.json (valid schema written via `pending-approval.sh --offer`), invoking scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh as a PreToolUse hook with a `git commit` payload returned permissionDecision=deny with the pending-question text. Direct shell `git commit` succeeded as expected (PreToolUse not enforced in shell-direct path — same U-C surface).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve cleared the sentinel; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocation no longer blocked on pending-approval (it then blocked on Phase 2 init verification, which is a different gate, not the sentinel).

tests.name: recorded_feature_appears_in_progress
tests.details: jq '.features_completed' .claude/build-progress.json includes both 'uat-feat-1' and 'uat-feat-2'.

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: shell-direct git commit bypasses BL-006 PreToolUse gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: Run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` directly in the shell with no active build_loop. The commit succeeds (RC=0). The framework's process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message returns RC=1 with the proper block message, so the gate logic is correct — but it's only enforced when Claude Code routes the commit through the PreToolUse hook.
framework_bugs.expected: feat: commits without an active build_loop should be blocked at the git-hook level (.git/hooks/commit-msg) so shell-direct commits also fail.
framework_bugs.actual: Block only fires when invoked via Claude Code's PreToolUse pipeline. Confirms still-open U-C from the 2026-04-25 sweep.

POC projects complete at Phase 3. To unlock Phase 4: bash scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-production'. This is the documented behavior, not a regression. Recorded as pass because the gate fired correctly.

summary: Base/private_poc/mobile/standard config completes Phases 0–3 cleanly on framework HEAD d66e8f2. PR #17/#18/#19 fixes (BL-016 non-interactive init, fake-remote tolerance, framework-self guard, BL-015 sentinel helper, U-H file copying) all verified. Two prior-sweep bugs re-confirmed at Medium severity: U-C (shell-direct git bypasses BL-006) and U-D (no script auto-advances current_phase). No new regressions surfaced.
